full_steam_ahead.ponder.testing_ponder.t: Start with the piston head, piston body, and a two-layer ring of Cylinder Walls
One wall may be replaced by a Steam Inlet; this is where piped steam enters the engine
A regular Create shaft sits above the empty stroke space and becomes the engine output
Build a Create boiler beside the engine: Fluid Tanks, Blaze Burners, and a steady water supply
The Boiler Outlet turns boiler pressure into steam flow
Finally, connect the outlet to the Steam Inlet with Create fluid pipes
When steam reaches the inlet, the piston drives the shaft like a large Create steam engine
